name: occam-hanlon-razor
description: Evaluations for occam-hanlon-razor skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive-explicit
evals.description: Skill should trigger when user suspects analysis paralysis, over-complexity, or conspiracy thinking

prompts.input: 用奥卡姆剃刀分析这个问题的最简单解释
I keep overthinking this. What's the simplest explanation for why this broke?
他是不是故意的？还是就是不知道？用汉隆剃刀分析下
prompts.reason: Chinese trigger '汉隆' (Hanlon) + malice vs incompetence question

prompts.input: I'm stuck in analysis paralysis. Apply Occam's razor to cut through the complexity
过度分析了吧？最简单的解释应该是对的
prompts.reason: Chinese triggers: '过度分析' (over-analysis) + simplicity principle

evals.name: trigger-negative-general
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for deep analysis, known adversarial scenarios, or non-explanation requests

prompts.input: This is a known security incident - I need to analyze all attack vectors in detail
prompts.reason: Known adversarial scenario; razors don't apply when malice is certain

prompts.input: Help me debug this application using structured root cause analysis
prompts.reason: Systematic debugging should trigger five-whys, not razors

prompts.input: 我们需要穷尽分析所有可能性，不能遗漏任何选项
prompts.reason: Exhaustive analysis requirement contradicts razor philosophy; should use MECE
